body: The mayor, aldermen and common council of any city, the warden and burgesses of any borough and the selectmen of any town may license and regulate any exhibitions therein; but selectmen shall not license any such exhibition within the limits of any city or borough.
See Sec. 29-129 et seq. re licensure of amusement parks.
content.plainText:
The mayor, aldermen and common council of any city, the warden and burgesses of any borough and the selectmen of any town may license and regulate any exhibitions therein; but selectmen shall not license any such exhibition within the limits of any city or borough.

See Sec. 29-129 et seq. re licensure of amusement parks.

sections.heading: Sec. 21-7. Exhibits relating to venereal diseases.
Sec. 21-8. Witnesses for state not to be prosecuted.

body: No person who testifies for the state in any prosecution for any unlawful exhibition or erection or construction therefor or forfeiture accruing therefrom shall thereafter be prosecuted for anything about which he has so testified.
content.plainText: No person who testifies for the state in any prosecution for any unlawful exhibition or erection or construction therefor or forfeiture accruing therefrom shall thereafter be prosecuted for anything about which he has so testified.
